# SYNTHETIC fixture (see tools/README.md): hand-built valid CT-485 frames in the
# Phase 1 sniffer serial format 'millis gap_us HEX...'. A HEAT_DEMAND walk
# 40->100% (the stimulus-response modulation hunt) with matching 0x82 status
# responses. Line below starts MID-FRAME to exercise the resync slider.
100000 104000 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 50 d7 39 ff 01 02 02 02 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 50 d7 39
100350 4200 02 ff 02 01 66 00 02 82 20 0c 00 16 00 00 00 00 01 50 0f 00 00 00 92 30
130000 104000 ff 01 02 02 02 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 50 d7 39
130350 4200 02 ff 02 01 66 00 02 82 20 0c 00 16 00 00 00 00 01 50 0f 00 00 00 92 30
160000 104000 ff 01 02 02 02 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 78 87 61
160350 4200 02 ff 02 01 66 00 02 82 20 0c 00 16 00 00 00 00 01 78 0f 00 00 00 a1 f8
190000 104000 ff 01 02 02 02 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 78 87 61
190350 4200 02 ff 02 01 66 00 02 82 20 0c 00 16 00 00 00 00 01 78 0f 00 00 00 a1 f8
220000 104000 ff 01 02 02 02 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 a0 37 89
220350 4200 02 ff 02 01 66 00 02 82 20 0c 00 16 00 00 00 00 01 a0 0f 00 00 00 b0 c1
250000 104000 ff 01 02 02 02 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 c8 e6 b1
250350 4200 02 ff 02 01 66 00 02 82 20 0c 00 16 00 00 00 00 01 c8 0f 00 00 00 bf 8a
280000 104000 ff 01 02 02 02 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 c8 e6 b1
280350 4200 02 ff 02 01 66 00 02 82 20 0c 00 16 00 00 00 00 01 c8 0f 00 00 00 bf 8a
310000 104000 ff 01 02 02 02 00 01 03 20 04 64 00 60 00 78 e8
310350 4200 02 ff 02 01 66 00 02 82 20 0c 00 16 00 00 00 00 01 00 0f 00 00 00 74 9e
